data.summary_suggestion: Search Systembolaget product catalog by criteria
data.description_suggestion: Search the Systembolaget product catalog using multiple filter criteria. Supports filtering by product name, category, alcohol content, price range, and other attributes. Returns a paginated list of matching products with metadata including product number, name, type, alcohol percentage, price, and availability information. Use this operation to discover products matching specific customer preferences or requirements.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific product by its product number. Use this operation to get complete product specifications after identifying a product number through search or other means.

data.current_summary: Get product inventory at specific store
data.description_suggestion: Check the current inventory status of a specific product at a particular Systembolaget store. Requires both the product number and store site ID. Returns inventory data including stock quantity, availability status, and last updated timestamp. Use this operation to verify product availability before directing customers to a specific store location.
